_comment: Golden cross-repo vector for the shared wire contract. The SAME file is committed to blueeye-server (src/license/__tests__/proof-vector.json), blueeye-licens (test/proof-vector.json) AND blueeye-agent (test/proof-vector.json); each repo independently asserts that its canonicalize() reproduces `canonical` byte-for-byte, that the Ed25519 signature verifies, and (server/agent) that its PROTOCOL_VERSION matches `protocolVersion`. If a test fails here, the repos have drifted on the signed-bytes / protocol contract — fix the code, do NOT regenerate this file on one side only. The key pair is TEST-ONLY, generated for this fixture and used for nothing else.
